MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANTS KENCOVE FARM FENCE, INC. AND POWERFIELDS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROPOSITION 65. ORDER AND JUDGEMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM =(302/EPS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE 25249.7(F)4) AND CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6, JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE CONSENT JUDGMENT ATTACHED HERETO AS EXHIBIT A. BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 664.6. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS.)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Russell Brimer's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with Defendants Kencove Farm Fence, Inc. and Powerfields is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements of Proposition 65.

Order and Judgement are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com =(302/EPS)
